meaning: n.抒情诗,歌词adj.(供)吟唱的,抒情的
examples: Opera Lyrica or lyric opera refers to what we think of as opera, the musical drama.
To see what Hughes' blues poetry might have been like if he had truly adopted the classic blues as his model, one need only look to "Golden Brown Blues", a song lyric Hughes wrote for composer Handy.
It's a very intimate lyric, very, very intimate.
About a week after the girls disappeared, investigators said they thought Lyric and Elizabeth were alive.
The blues gets all of that, sometimes with just one lyric or one note.
